properties.name: East Coast (Northern) Line
properties.note: The centre tracks do NOT go through.

This was previously mapped as a path, but having surveyed it it is actually an overgrown former railway alignment, evidence of this former use is shown on old OS maps. It is not practical to walk along this route.
